summary: Tested 3 new admin route modules (admin_vip.py, admin_delivery.py, admin_system.py). All 25 backend tests pass - 100% success rate. All 11 requested endpoints working correctly.

minor.issue: Bare `except:` statements used instead of specific exception types
Bare `except:` statements used instead of specific exception types
Variable `admin_id` is assigned but not used in the function
minor.recommendation: Either use admin_id for logging or remove assignment

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 router modules (admin_vip.py, admin_delivery.py, admin_system.py) are properly extracted and integrated
Database references are correctly passed via set_db() functions for each router
Cache references properly injected via set_cache() where needed
Helper functions are properly injected via set_helpers() for routes that need them (log_admin_action, check_and_grant_referral_reward)
MongoDB _id is properly excluded from query projections in all routes
All routers are properly mounted to api_router with correct /admin prefix
Good use of caching in VIP payments list endpoint with configurable TTL (5s for pending, 30s for others)
Proper pagination implemented in list endpoints
seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_ prefixed delivery partners for testing (can be cleaned up)
